channel.title: Read on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Read on Tech Tracker

item.title: Mentorist - Read or listen best books summaries for free.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-bqA28TpUAuM/YcyWZs_YWII/AAAAAAAAIKs/7pR8Xmq5jWcSB8YiNZHJhnhZxb8NUU29QCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1640797794373957-0.png" alt=""> You can learn skills, ideas, strategies, habits, routines and many more through books, many people like to read books while some people like to listen books , now-a-days we have numerous platforms available for people to read and listen books online using Amazon Kindle or Amazon Audible etc, however not every one have money, time or interest to buy, read or listen full book. This is why, people like to read book summaries to save time and increase productivity, however most books don’t provide text or audio summaries, so to fix this issue now we got to see many apps available on Internet which will provide text and audio summaries of book.
